{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305002586229F303B727BAC2E11"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606558752804946712","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，看了几章就欲罢不能了，越到后面越爽文、男主解锁了不少技能，期待后面"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771043160,"group_id":"7596683114072525886","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"饭都不吃也要码字的作者君","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6iqt4QTdNeh870nJ50pEEQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d83f254d2ec34bc7abab794d604f2b39~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791561&x-signature=1AuxWKD9Um1oDUeCmdl%2BB3MK2CE%3D","user_id":"111060449242","user_name":"一天三顿饱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111060449242","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_4","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.4","title_id":"author_level_4"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.4","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.4"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596683114072525886","book_info":{"abstract":"“你一个月挣几千，连个包都买不起，废物……”
妻子苏曼拿着离婚证甩到林辰脸上……
林辰刚被离婚，就被喊去医院签字。
女神校花秦若曦怀孕了？！
是哪个负心汉！
什么？
负心汉居然是我！！
四胞胎！自己喜当爹！？
【叮！恭喜宿主绑定多子多福＋望子成龙系统！】
自此……
大宝：半岁徒手掰钢管！一岁反手拉枪栓！
二宝：三个月会唱rap！一岁拿下街舞冠军！
三宝：五个月电脑入侵警方数据库！
四宝：我最后一个出生，我什么都会亿点点很合理吧？
眼看林辰家四个娃越长越大，越大越有才，奖励越来越多……
林辰影响力越来越大，知名度越来越高！
龙国新晋神秘首富，是他？！
在世华佗……破案之神……全都是他！
前妻悔断肠，跪地求复合：“林辰，再给我一次机会……”
林辰搂着回来的校花女神：“滚，你碍我老婆眼了……”
网友：“试问义父还缺儿子吗？孙子也行！”
孩子家长：“主播求教养孩子秘籍啊！”
国家下场：有林辰，是我华夏之福！
